query: SELECT o.userId, o.customerName, o.customerPhone, COUNT(*) as orderCount, SUM(o.totalAmount) as totalSpent FROM orders o WHERE o.customerName LIKE '%Rinold%' OR o.customerPhone = '7085637756' GROUP BY o.userId, o.customerName, o.customerPhone;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT o.userId, o.customerName, o.customerPhone, COUNT(*) as orderCount, SUM(o.totalAmount) as totalSpent FROM orders o WHERE o.customerName LIKE '%Rinold%' OR o.customerPhone = '7085637756' GROUP BY o.userId, o.customerName, o.customerPhone;
